= []
for task in tasks:
    try:
        resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/tasks/create", json=task, timeout=10)
        if resp.status_code == 200:
            result = resp.json()
            created_tasks.append({"title": task["title"], "status": "created", "id": result.get("id", "unknown")})
            print(f"✓ Created: {task['title']}")
        else:
            print(f"✗ Failed: {task['title']} - {resp.status_code} {resp.text}")
            created_tasks.append({"title": task["title"], "status": "failed", "error": resp.text})
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✗ Error creating {task['title']}: {str(e)}")
        created_tasks.append({"title": task["title"], "status": "error", "error": str(e)})

print("\n=== Summary ===")
print(json.dumps(created_tasks, indent=2))
